overview: A Netflix-style anime OTT streaming platform on the Internet Computer with season management, custom video player, admin panel, AI chat assistant, episode comments, and ratings.
features: Season management (create, edit, delete seasons per anime)
Season selector tabs/dropdown on watch page
Admin panel season management with episode linking
Custom video player with Google Drive, YouTube, direct URL support
Admin panel for anime, episodes, seasons, and requests
AI chat assistant with OpenAI integration
Episode comments and star ratings with threaded replies
Netflix-style dark UI with red accent
